title: Personalised Christening Bib Baptism bib Embroidered Satin in White or Ivory (White)
features: Available in white or cream/ivory with shaped edge

TO PERSONALISE Please choose one of the following (1) select GIFT MESSAGE at the checkout and leave your embroidery details in the gift message box. (2.) Call or text us on 07973 725717. (3) Send the SELLER a message through AMAZON. Whichever option you choose please leave the name, date, whether it is a baptism or christening and the colour you require the embroidery in. If you don't manage to leave your embroidery details - we will contact you by phone or email.
